name: para_arm_fires_cycle2_real_velocity_high
description: Cycle-2: symphony was at 2.0% after cycle-1 (prev_return = 2.0, a real intraday observation). Now at 4.0%. velocity = 4.0 - 2.0 = 2.0, which meets PARABOLIC_VELOCITY_THRESHOLD=2.0. PARA-ARM must fire. Proves sentinel fix does NOT suppress legitimate intraday velocity after cycle-1.
